period_subtitle_zh: 解決『寫不深、看不明、沒力氣』
source: PSE v6.0 (Prompt Semantic Engine, by 酒Ann, 2026)

transparency_class_summary.rationale: Distribution reflects PSE's origin as advertising/copywriting catalogue: ~13% of moves cross into manipulation territory under ToneSoul's gate-3 mechanism check (covert pressure / fake urgency / fear induction / identity capture). ~38% are clarity-improving moves that survive both honesty and self-application gates. The plurality (~49%) are useful moves that change framing or attention but require declaration to remain honest.

elements.name: 注意力強驅構造
elements.pse_definition: 脫離天體引力所需的最低速度
elements.pse_operation: 設計一個極強的開頭，其動能必須足以讓讀者擺脫「滑過」的慣性。
elements.rationale: Hook works partially without declaration (surprise factor depends on reader not noticing the device); declared use remains honest as 'I'm using a strong opening to keep your attention'.

elements.name: 退出阻斷構造
elements.pse_definition: 黑洞周圍資訊無法逃脫的邊界
elements.pse_operation: 設計一個資訊黑洞，確保讀者在閱讀前三句後，因資訊密度過高而無法離開。
elements.rationale: Density-based attention capture; declaring 'I'm packing density to keep you reading' is honest, undeclared use becomes inattention exploitation.

elements.name: 顛覆性主張構造
elements.pse_definition: 引力無限大、維度崩塌的點
elements.pse_operation: 提出一個顛覆產業現狀的核心觀點，使所有既有規則在此觀點面前失效。
elements.rationale: Paradigm-shift claim requires declaration so reader can weigh evidence; without declaration, smuggles a strong claim under rhetorical confidence.

elements.name: 未聲明影響源
elements.pse_definition: 充滿宇宙背景的微弱能量
elements.pse_operation: 在全文背景中埋下品牌暗示，像背景輻射一樣無處不在但不明顯。
elements.rationale: PSE operation explicitly says '無處不在但不明顯' — covertness is the defining mechanism. Subliminal suggestion fails safe_extraction §5.3 red list.
surface_signals: 品牌名重複出現作為背景
顏色/詞彙的暗示性鋪陳

elements.name: 對手結構崩潰描述
elements.pse_definition: 天體因引力瓦解的最短距離
elements.pse_operation: 描述競爭對手因為過於接近你的核心優勢區，導致其邏輯徹底瓦解。
elements.rationale: Competitive analysis is legitimate when framed honestly with evidence; '徹底瓦解' is dramatic and risks overstating opponent's failure mode.

elements.name: 隱性結構揭露
elements.pse_definition: 無法看見但佔據宇宙多數的物質
elements.pse_operation: 揭露產業中不為人知、卻暗中操控一切的「隱性痛點」或價值。
elements.rationale: Reveal of real hidden factor is clarity; performative '其實有個秘密' framing without substance is rhetorical inflation. Declaration separates the two cases.

elements.name: 第三方信用挪用
elements.pse_definition: 巨大質量彎曲光線的現象
elements.pse_operation: 利用大環境趨勢或權威數據來「折射」讀者的注意力，使其聚焦於你的產品。
elements.rationale: Citing authority is legitimate; the manipulation risk is using authority X (which doesn't endorse Y) to legitimize Y. Declaration of relationship between cited authority and claim resolves this.

elements.name: 高亮度突發發布
elements.pse_definition: 恆星劇烈爆炸釋放極大能量
elements.pse_operation: 創造短時間內極高亮度的發布文，在社群牆上瞬間奪取最高視覺。
elements.rationale: Visibility-pumping campaign should be visible as such; declaring 'this is a launch event' is honest, performing it as organic content is misleading.

elements.name: 假時限構造
elements.pse_definition: 物體靠近觀察者時波長變短
elements.pse_operation: 創造「未來已至」的即時感，縮短讀者與目標之間的心理距離。
elements.rationale: Direct hit on safe_extraction §5.3 red list: fake urgency / manufactured time pressure for action.

elements.name: 落後焦慮構造
elements.pse_definition: 物體遠離觀察者時波長變長
elements.pse_operation: 描述舊時代觀念的落後與漸行漸遠，誘發讀者產生被時代拋下的焦慮。
elements.rationale: PSE operation explicitly names '誘發焦慮' (induce anxiety) as the goal; fear-of-being-left-behind is fear escalation per safe_extraction §5.3.

elements.name: 易讀性提升
elements.pse_definition: 天體反射光線的能力
elements.pse_operation: 控制內容的反射率，確保複雜資訊能被讀者大腦快速、無損地反射理解。
elements.rationale: Pure clarity move; passes both honesty gate (no claims inflated) and self-application gate (works whether declared or not).

elements.name: 概念碎片化
elements.pse_definition: 高能粒子撞擊產生的碎片
elements.pse_operation: 將一個龐大的宏觀概念，擊碎成無數好吸收、好轉發的微小資訊片段。
elements.rationale: Chunking for absorption is clarity; survives both gates.

elements.name: 觀測點換軌
elements.pse_definition: 不同觀測點看目標的位移
elements.pse_operation: 從完全出乎意料的非傳統座標，重新描述同一個習以為常的產品。
elements.rationale: Honest reframing; survives both gates because alternative perspectives are legitimate analysis.

elements.name: 分眾濾波
elements.pse_definition: 尋找外星文明的訊號
elements.pse_operation: 針對極少數的「高端/專業受眾」發送特定頻譜的指令，過濾雜訊。
elements.rationale: Audience targeting is clarity for fit; explicit filtering avoids misleading non-target readers.

elements.name: 無索取陳述
elements.pse_definition: 理論上只噴射而不吸收的點
elements.pse_operation: 執行 100% 的乾貨噴射，不帶任何行銷目的，純以內容厚度建立神格。
elements.rationale: Aligned with Axiom 1 priority chain (誠實高於有益); content without conversion intent is the canonical green move.

elements.name: 新興賽道指認
elements.pse_definition: 星際雲塌縮產生的新星誕生地
elements.pse_operation: 精準描繪一個新趨勢的「孕育期」，引導讀者成為第一批定居者。
elements.rationale: Pointing at emerging trend is clarity if the trend is real; '第一批定居者' framing carries FOMO subtext that must be declared to avoid masking fear-of-missing-out as analysis.

elements.name: 默認前提聲明
elements.pse_definition: 空間本身擁有的能量密度
elements.pse_operation: 定義一個文案中不可撼動的「背景假設」，作為所有推論的起點。
elements.rationale: Stated assumptions are legitimate when declared as assumptions; smuggled assumptions disguised as facts are deception. Declaration is the dividing line. (Also see Q6 in spec §11 for the bidirectional version.)

elements.name: 心理鎖定構造
elements.pse_definition: 衛星始終以同一面朝向行星
elements.pse_operation: 建立一種心理鎖定，讓讀者無論如何轉動，目光始終對準你的優勢。
elements.rationale: PSE operation explicitly says '心理鎖定' (psychological lock-in); even declared, the lock framing is inherently coercive to autonomy. Identity capture territory.

elements.name: 極端情境驗證
elements.pse_definition: 探討生命在極端環境的可能性
elements.pse_operation: 挑戰極端的使用場景，說明產品在最嚴苛的條件下依然能產出成果。
elements.rationale: Robustness demonstration through edge cases is clarity; passes both gates if cases are real.

elements.name: 認知負荷緩衝
elements.pse_definition: 恆星之間廣闊的真空
elements.pse_operation: 在兩段高能量資訊之間插入「真空區」，防止讀者大腦過載。
elements.rationale: Cognitive load management is clarity; survives both gates.

elements.name: 防備心繞過構造
elements.pse_definition: 微觀粒子穿越能量壁壘的現象
elements.pse_operation: 直接無視讀者的防備心或常見反對意見，直接切入核心利益點。
elements.rationale: PSE operation says '無視讀者的防備心' (ignore reader's defenses) — bypassing autonomy. Covert mechanism per safe_extraction §6.2.

elements.name: 平衡位點定位
elements.pse_definition: 兩大天體引力平衡的穩定點
elements.pse_operation: 在兩個強大的競爭觀點中，找到一個讀者感到最平衡、最舒適的心理位置。
elements.rationale: Honest positioning between alternatives is clarity; survives both gates.

elements.name: 高密度壓縮
elements.pse_definition: 恆星核心極度壓縮至高密度狀態
elements.pse_operation: 將萬字長文精煉成一句具備「無限重量」的警世金句。
elements.rationale: Compression to essence is clarity; passes both gates when distillation preserves accuracy.

elements.name: 感官全面佔領
elements.pse_definition: 導致宇宙加速膨脹的未知能量
elements.pse_operation: 讓內容具備自我複製與加速傳播的屬性，主動佔領讀者所有感官。
elements.rationale: PSE operation says '佔領讀者所有感官' — sensory occupation crosses into identity-capture territory. Aggressive saturation aimed at autonomy override.

elements.name: 規律刺激節奏
elements.pse_definition: 定期發出極強電磁脈衝的天體
elements.pse_operation: 在長文中設定規律的「刺激點」，確保讀者不會在過程中分心或睡著。
elements.rationale: Pacing for sustained attention is normal writing technique; '確保讀者不會分心' framing makes it engagement-driven, requires declaration.

elements.name: 生態圈獨佔構造
elements.pse_definition: 包圍恆星以獲取全部能量的裝置
elements.pse_operation: 將所有價值點完美包覆在品牌體系內，讓讀者無法從其他地方獲取同類能量。
elements.rationale: PSE operation explicitly designs vendor lock-in ('讓讀者無法從其他地方獲取'); this is autonomy restriction by design.

elements.name: 身份認同綁定
elements.pse_definition: 兩個粒子互相關聯，無視距離
elements.pse_operation: 讓產品特點與讀者的「身份認同」產生即時連動，動一髮而牽全身。
elements.rationale: Identity-product merging is identity capture per safe_extraction §5.3; brand-as-self framing weaponizes self-concept.

elements.name: 適用範圍標示
elements.pse_definition: 行星表面能維持液態水的範圍
elements.pse_operation: 精準描述產品最適用的「舒適圈」，排除非目標客戶。
elements.rationale: Honest fit description is clarity; explicit non-fit declaration improves reader autonomy.

elements.name: 長期穩定供給
elements.pse_definition: 恆星生命中最穩定的氫融合階段
elements.pse_operation: 建立長期、穩定且高品質的專業內容人設，累積長期引力。
elements.rationale: Consistency and quality build legitimate trust; passes both gates.

elements.name: 對比突顯構造
elements.pse_definition: 兩顆恆星互相遮蔽、互相影響
elements.pse_operation: 透過兩大觀點的碰撞與遮蔽效應，突顯其中一方的明亮。
elements.rationale: Comparison can be honest analysis or strawmanning; declaring '我選擇 X 觀點對比' separates the two cases.

elements.name: 中心地位主張
elements.pse_definition: 位於星系中心，控制萬物旋轉
elements.pse_operation: 將品牌塑造成產業中心，讓所有討論與流量都繞著你轉。
elements.rationale: Authority claim of centrality requires evidence; declared as positioning aspiration is honest, performed as factual centrality is overstated.

elements.name: 結構化呈現
elements.pse_definition: 連結星系團的巨大纖維狀結構
elements.pse_operation: 將散亂的資訊片段，串接成一張邏輯嚴密的宏大網路。
elements.rationale: Information organization without deception; passes both gates.

elements.name: 短期高光事件
elements.pse_definition: 表面物質劇烈核融合產生的突亮
elements.pse_operation: 在平淡的日常中製造一個短暫但極高亮度的驚喜事件。
elements.rationale: Event marketing must be declared as such; performing a campaign as organic content is misleading.

elements.name: 觀念衝擊構造
elements.pse_definition: 恆星內部的地震現象
elements.pse_operation: 在讀者根深蒂固的觀念裡投下震盪，迫使其重新思考。
elements.rationale: Provoking reconsideration is legitimate when grounded; '迫使' is hyperbolic but mechanism remains clarity-driven if the challenge is honest.

elements.name: 結論誘導構造
elements.pse_definition: 物質在引力下向中心匯聚的過程
elements.pse_operation: 將所有分散的論點最後導向唯一的結論——「非買不可」。
elements.rationale: PSE operation explicitly designs funnel-to-conversion ('非買不可'); this is purchase coercion through rhetorical lock-in.

elements.name: 情感底色構造
elements.pse_definition: 宇宙大爆炸留下的餘溫
elements.pse_operation: 為文案鋪設一層溫暖、具備歷史感的背景底色。
elements.rationale: Emotional tone-setting is legitimate when declared; an undeclared emotional layer can bypass critical reading.

elements.name: 可預測性展示
elements.pse_definition: 描述行星繞日運行的三條定律
elements.pse_operation: 展示產品的邏輯演化是有跡可循的，增加讀者的信任感。
elements.rationale: Predictability claim is legitimate when grounded in actual track record; declared with evidence becomes green-equivalent.

elements.name: 邏輯封閉迴圈
elements.pse_definition: 光線在強引力下繞圈的區域
elements.pse_operation: 設計一個讓讀者不斷反覆咀嚼、越想越有道理的邏輯圈套。
elements.rationale: PSE operation says '邏輯圈套' (logical trap); designed self-reinforcing logic that defends against scrutiny is manipulation regardless of declaration.

elements.name: 情緒持續推送
elements.pse_definition: 恆星釋放的高能粒子流
elements.pse_operation: 利用情緒化的文字持續「吹向」讀者，清除其心理塵埃。
elements.rationale: Sustained emotional pressure to '清除心理塵埃' is emotional override; continuous affective wash bypasses cognitive evaluation.

elements.name: 記憶錨點構造
elements.pse_definition: 撞擊留下的永久凹痕
elements.pse_operation: 在讀者心中留下一個深刻、不可磨滅的印象點。
elements.rationale: Memorability is legitimate goal when achieved through real substance; declared as stylistic choice it is honest, performed as 'plant impression' it borders manipulation.

elements.name: 不可反駁前提
elements.pse_definition: 真空本身的能量密度
elements.pse_operation: 定義一個讀者無法反駁的公理作為討論起點。
elements.rationale: Near-duplicate of [Cm]; '無法反駁' framing risks smuggling assumptions. Declaration that this is an assumption (not proof) keeps it honest.

elements.name: 遠程目標描繪
elements.pse_definition: 宇宙中最亮、最遙遠的天體
elements.pse_operation: 描繪一個極其遙遠但亮度驚人的未來目標。
elements.rationale: Vision casting is legitimate when declared as aspiration; presented as predictive certainty it overstates.

elements.name: 邊際視角切入
elements.pse_definition: 太陽系邊緣的冰冷物質區
elements.pse_operation: 從產業最冷門、邊緣的角度切入，發現沒人看到的商機。
elements.rationale: Underexplored perspective is clarity through novelty; passes both gates if observation is genuine.

elements.name: 成長階段地圖
elements.pse_definition: 分類恆星演化階段的圖表
elements.pse_operation: 為讀者畫出一張從新手到專家的演化地圖。
elements.rationale: Progression mapping is clarity for orientation; passes both gates.

elements.name: 間接影響聲稱
elements.pse_definition: 時空結構的時空漣漪
elements.pse_operation: 即便不直接接觸，你的觀點也能透過時空漣漪影響深遠。
elements.rationale: Influence-at-a-distance claims need declaration; without it, the metaphor inflates actual reach.

elements.name: 噪訊濾除
elements.pse_definition: 阻擋光線的微小粒子
elements.pse_operation: 在指令中要求 AI 濾除所有妨礙理解的專有名詞與贅字。
elements.rationale: Noise reduction is pure clarity; passes both gates.

elements.name: 經驗精煉提取
elements.pse_definition: 恆星冷卻後的緻密殘骸
elements.pse_operation: 總結過去失敗的經驗，提取出最純粹的教訓與精華。
elements.rationale: Lessons distillation from real history is clarity; passes both gates.

elements.name: 最佳時機選取
elements.pse_definition: 兩個天體間能量傳輸的最佳時機
elements.pse_operation: 掌握特定的節慶或時事，發出能量最強的一擊。
elements.rationale: Timing as strategy is legitimate when declared; '最強一擊' framing implies engineered impact rather than natural fit.

elements.name: 慢性流失警示
elements.pse_definition: 行星失去大氣層的過程
elements.pse_operation: 警告讀者如果不採取行動，其既有的優勢將會慢性流失。
elements.rationale: Loss-warning is fear-based pressure to act; '慢性流失' framing manufactures slow-burn anxiety. Even when partly true, the framing weaponizes the truth.

elements.name: 終極歸納構造
elements.pse_definition: 宇宙最終坍縮回原點的假說
elements.pse_operation: 將所有的萬象歸一，給出一個終極的簡單真理。
elements.rationale: Synthesis to single principle can be clarity if true; risk of oversimplification when forced. Declaration as 'this is my synthesis' keeps it honest.

elements.name: 情緒抑制累積構造
elements.pse_definition: 能量最低、系統最穩定的區域
elements.pse_operation: 在轉換前刻意營造壓抑感，累積讀者的「解決問題慾望」。
elements.rationale: PSE operation explicitly says '刻意營造壓抑感' for conversion; deliberately manufactured emotional pressure for sales is manipulation.

elements.name: 價值對位構造
elements.pse_definition: 系統振幅達到最大的特定頻率
elements.pse_operation: 調校文案語氣，精準對準受眾的底層價值觀，引發靈魂震盪。
elements.rationale: Value alignment is honest when values genuinely match; performing alignment without sharing values is manipulation. Declaration of which values are being addressed keeps it accountable.

elements.name: 情感收斂控制
elements.pse_definition: 系統振盪後的衰減特性
elements.pse_operation: 設定文案的情緒收斂速度，防止過度狗血，保持專業高級感。
elements.rationale: Emotional moderation is clarity (avoiding manipulation by avoiding excess); passes both gates.

elements.name: 後果具象化
elements.pse_definition: 孤立系統總是趨向混亂的過程
elements.pse_operation: 描述如果不介入處理，讀者的生活/事業將會如何自動崩潰。
elements.rationale: Articulating real consequences of inaction is honest analysis; '自動崩潰' framing risks fear inflation. Declaration that this is consequence-mapping (not certainty) keeps it accountable.

elements.name: 慣性突破誘因
elements.pse_definition: 物體保持運動狀態不變的特性
elements.pse_operation: 承認讀者既有的思考慣性，並施加足夠的力（誘因）來改變它。
elements.rationale: Acknowledging then nudging existing habits is honest if the proposed shift is grounded; declaration of 'I'm trying to shift you' separates honest persuasion from manipulation.

elements.name: 行動阻力分析
elements.pse_definition: 物體開始運動前所受的阻力
elements.pse_operation: 分析讀者不敢下單的首要原因，並在指令中優先解決此阻力。
elements.rationale: Friction analysis can be honest help (genuine concerns addressed) or pure conversion engineering (objections dispatched without substance). Declared intent matters.

elements.name: 文字緊縮提升
elements.pse_definition: 液體表面縮小的趨勢
elements.pse_operation: 要求 AI 將文字緊縮，讓每一句話都具備飽滿的、呼之欲出的彈性。
elements.rationale: Compactness is clarity; passes both gates.

elements.name: 資訊密度循環
elements.pse_definition: 流體因密度差異產生的熱交換
elements.pse_operation: 在文案中創造高價值與低門檻資訊的循環，保持閱讀熱度。
elements.rationale: Alternating depth for sustained engagement is clarity; passes both gates.

elements.name: 利益視角重述
elements.pse_definition: 光線進入不同介質時的偏折
elements.pse_operation: 將一個乾巴巴的數據，透過「利益視角」折射成閃閃發光的優勢。
elements.rationale: Reframing data through user-benefit perspective is legitimate when the benefit is real; '閃閃發光' inflation risk requires declaration of framing.

elements.name: 句長交替節奏
elements.pse_definition: 波動連續兩個波峰間的距離
elements.pse_operation: 控制短句與長句的交替頻率，創造特定的心理節奏感。
elements.rationale: Sentence-length variation is basic prose technique for readability; passes both gates.

elements.name: 高強度行動呼籲
elements.pse_definition: 物體運動所擁有的能量
elements.pse_operation: 在結尾處增加高強度的 Call to Action，讓讀者帶著衝勁去點擊。
elements.rationale: CTAs are inherently declared (the action request is visible); '高強度' '衝勁' framing implies emotional priming, requires honest declaration of urgency basis.

elements.name: 反向心理利用
elements.pse_definition: 感應電流總是反抗磁通量變化
elements.pse_operation: 預判讀者的防衛性反擊，並利用其反作用力來強化你的論點。
elements.rationale: Anticipating objections is honest argumentation; '利用反作用力' framing borders on weaponizing reactance. Declared as 'I anticipate you might think X' it remains honest.

elements.name: 受眾溫度評估
elements.pse_definition: 單位質量升溫所需的熱量
elements.pse_operation: 評估受眾的冷熱程度。高比熱受眾需要更多的前戲與信任鋪陳。
elements.rationale: Audience-readiness assessment is clarity for matching content depth to reader; passes both gates.

elements.name: 中段穩定供給
elements.pse_definition: 重力與阻力平衡後的恆定速度
elements.pse_operation: 進入長文的中段，保持資訊輸出的穩定感，避免讀者疲勞。
elements.rationale: Fatigue management through steady pacing is clarity; passes both gates.

elements.name: 語意阻力移除
elements.pse_definition: 電阻消失的極端物理現象
elements.pse_operation: 要求 AI 移除所有語意障礙，創造一種「滑順得不可思議」的閱讀體驗。
elements.rationale: Reading-friction removal is clarity; passes both gates.

elements.name: 情感殘留設計
elements.pse_definition: 磁化狀態落後於磁場變化的現象
elements.pse_operation: 在文案結束後，依然在讀者腦中留下縈繞不去的強烈印象。
elements.rationale: Lingering impression is legitimate craft when grounded in substance; engineered as standalone effect it borders on manipulation.

elements.name: 防禦繞過構造
elements.pse_definition: 液體在細管中自動上升的力
elements.pse_operation: 利用細微的小故事，不知不覺地將價值觀滲透進讀者的防禦壁。
elements.rationale: PSE operation explicitly designs covert value-installation ('不知不覺地將價值觀滲透進防禦壁'); textbook covert manipulation per safe_extraction §5.3.

elements.name: 邏輯閉環構造
elements.pse_definition: 光線完全折回原介質的現象
elements.pse_operation: 確保文案內部邏輯完美鎖定，任何質疑都會被反射回核心論點。
elements.rationale: Closed-loop logic that reflects all challenges back to its premise is unfalsifiable. Real arguments must be open to disconfirmation; this design defeats that.

elements.name: 距離迫近感製造
elements.pse_definition: 觀測者與波源運動產生的頻率變化
elements.pse_operation: 創造一種目標「飛速靠近」或威脅「疾速逼近」的體感。
elements.rationale: Manufactured threat-distance / urgency through doppler-like framing is fear induction.

elements.name: 即時回饋連動
elements.pse_definition: 微觀粒子跨越空間的瞬時連動
elements.pse_operation: 讓讀者的每一個小動作（如按讚）都能獲得即時的強大回饋感。
elements.rationale: Engagement feedback design is borderline; declared as gamification it is honest, performed as 'natural' connection it manipulates dopamine response.

elements.name: 情緒高潮釋放
elements.pse_definition: 電場強度足以將粒子噴出的狀態
elements.pse_operation: 在文案的高潮點，將蓄積已久的情感能量一次噴發。
elements.rationale: Emotional climax is legitimate dramatic technique; engineered as conversion-trigger it requires declaration.

elements.name: 隨機聯想擴散
elements.pse_definition: 微小粒子受撞擊產生的無規則運動
elements.pse_operation: 在腦暴階段使用，讓 AI 產生跨度極大、看似隨機但有趣的點子。
elements.rationale: Brainstorming through random association is generative move neutral on manipulation axis.

elements.name: 互補論點疊加
elements.pse_definition: 兩個波疊加後振幅增大的現象
elements.pse_operation: 使用兩個互補的優勢，產生一加一大於二的加成效果。
elements.rationale: Honest synergy between complementary points is clarity; passes both gates if synergy is real.

elements.name: 優劣抵消框架
elements.pse_definition: 兩個波疊加後振幅抵消的現象
elements.pse_operation: 用一個強大的優點來「覆蓋」並抵消產品既有的劣勢。
elements.rationale: Pros-outweigh-cons weighing is honest argumentation; '覆蓋' (cover) framing slips toward hiding weakness rather than weighing it. Declaration of trade-off keeps it accountable.

elements.name: 認知模式轉換
elements.pse_definition: 物質從一態轉變為另一態的過程
elements.pse_operation: 引導讀者從「看熱鬧」的心態轉變為「專業投資者」的心態。
elements.rationale: Mindset-shift induction is legitimate when grounded in genuine reframe; coercive when pushed without substance. Declaration of attempted shift is the honesty test.

elements.name: 主軸自動回正
elements.pse_definition: 旋轉物體維持旋轉軸方向的特性
elements.pse_operation: 無論文章扯多遠，始終能自動修正回品牌的核心價值。
elements.rationale: Thematic anchoring is structural clarity; passes both gates.

elements.name: 懸念留待構造
elements.pse_definition: 觀察與未知的界線
elements.pse_operation: 在文案結尾留下懸念，讓讀者必須點開下一篇才能解鎖。
elements.rationale: Cliffhangers are legitimate craft when promise of resolution is genuine; '必須' framing implies forced engagement that requires declaration.

elements.name: 流量路徑損耗控制
elements.pse_definition: 描述折射角度的數學規律
elements.pse_operation: 精確控制引導流量從社群轉向官網時的「路徑損耗」。
elements.rationale: Conversion-path optimization is engineering; declaration that 'this is conversion design' keeps it honest, performance as organic flow is misleading.

elements.name: 情緒平緩回歸
elements.pse_definition: 系統內各部分性質完全均勻的狀態
elements.pse_operation: 在一段激烈的進攻後，讓語氣回歸平穩，進行理性總結。
elements.rationale: Emotional reset to rational close is clarity-preserving; passes both gates.

elements.name: 長尾參考價值
elements.pse_definition: 遠離源頭後電磁場形成的特性
elements.pse_operation: 設計在發文兩周後依然具備參考價值的知識性內容。
elements.rationale: Long-form evergreen content is substantive value; passes both gates.

elements.name: 熱度時限收割
elements.pse_definition: 降溫速度正比於與環境的溫差
elements.pse_operation: 熱度消失得很快，必須在溫差最大（情緒最熱）時成交。
elements.rationale: PSE operation says '必須在情緒最熱時成交' — exploit emotional peak for purchase pressure. Time-pressure for closing = manufactured urgency for sales.

elements.name: 顆粒度提升
elements.pse_definition: 物質分解為獨立原子的過程
elements.pse_operation: 將專業名詞拆解到連小學生都能聽懂的顆粒度。
elements.rationale: Granularity for accessibility is clarity; passes both gates.

elements.name: 受眾分佈寬度
elements.pse_definition: 描述數值散佈的程度
elements.pse_operation: 決定內容是要服務大眾（高標準差）還是極小眾（極低標）。
elements.rationale: Audience-width decision is clarity for fit; passes both gates.

elements.name: 價值真空吸引
elements.pse_definition: 流速快則壓力小的流體現象
elements.pse_operation: 不主動進攻，而是透過展示高價值來創造吸引力的「真空」。
elements.rationale: Passive value-display is honest when value is real; '真空' framing implies engineered scarcity that requires declaration.

elements.name: 系列遞延勾連
elements.pse_definition: 一次反應產生的產物觸發後續反應
elements.pse_operation: 設計系列文，讓讀者看完第一篇自動想找第二篇。
elements.rationale: Series design is legitimate when each piece stands alone in value; engineered hook-chains require declaration.

elements.name: 對手反向利用
elements.pse_definition: 施力必伴隨大小相等方向相反的力
elements.pse_operation: 主動提出對手可能的批評，並利用該批評反彈出自己的優勢。
elements.rationale: Engaging objections is honest argumentation; '利用反彈出自己的優勢' framing borders on strawmanning that requires declaration of objection-engagement.

elements.name: 實質節省量化
elements.pse_definition: 力與位移的乘積
elements.pse_operation: 強調產品能為讀者節省多少功（體力、時間或腦力）。
elements.rationale: Concrete benefit articulation with quantification is clarity; passes both gates if numbers are honest.

elements.name: 效率倍率聲明
elements.pse_definition: 單位時間內作功的快慢
elements.pse_operation: 強調使用產品後，產出結果的速度提升了多少倍。
elements.rationale: Efficiency multiplier claim requires declaration of measurement basis; '提升X倍' without baseline is inflation.

elements.name: 處境洞察聲稱
elements.pse_definition: 透過光線分析物質組成
elements.pse_operation: 像照 X 光一樣，一眼看穿讀者目前的處境與核心障礙。
elements.rationale: Insight claims about reader can be honest analysis or cold-reading. Declaration of how the inference is derived keeps it accountable.

elements.name: 故意模糊構造
elements.pse_definition: 位置與動量無法同時精確測量
elements.pse_operation: 保留一部分資訊不說透，增加文案的曖昧性與探索慾。
elements.rationale: Withholding information is honest when followed up ('more in next post'); engineered ambiguity for engagement-mongering requires declaration.
surface_signals: 有些事你需要自己發現

elements.name: 時間感壓縮
elements.pse_definition: 大質量物體導致的幾何改變
elements.pse_operation: 透過敘事技巧，讓讀者覺得看你的文章「時間過得真快」。
elements.rationale: Engagement-pacing for time-flow perception is craft; engineered to override fatigue without substance is manipulation. Declaration keeps it honest.

elements.name: 非目標讀者排除
elements.pse_definition: 旋轉體系中遠離中心的虛擬力
elements.pse_operation: 在改寫過程中，自動甩開那些不屬於目標受眾的讀者。
elements.rationale: Honest non-fit declaration is clarity for both included and excluded; passes both gates.

elements.name: 閱讀減速設計
elements.pse_definition: 流體內部摩擦產生的阻力
elements.pse_operation: 增加文字的「黏度」，讓讀者不自覺地減慢閱讀速度來思考。
elements.rationale: Depth-pacing through complexity is clarity if substance warrants slowing; '不自覺地減慢' framing without substance is engagement-time manipulation.

elements.name: 核心金句迴盪
elements.pse_definition: 受恢復力作用而產生的週期運動
elements.pse_operation: 在文章末段重複出現的核心押韻或口號，形成迴盪。
elements.rationale: Refrain technique for memorability is clarity-preserving; passes both gates.

elements.name: 後果壓力施加
elements.pse_definition: 單位面積所受的垂直力
elements.pse_operation: 直接點出不處理痛點會導致的嚴重後果，施加閱讀壓力。
elements.rationale: PSE operation explicitly says '施加閱讀壓力' through dire-consequence framing; pressure-as-design = fear induction.

elements.name: 轉化關鍵時點
elements.pse_definition: 物質性質發生質變的特定狀態
elements.pse_operation: 精準掌握讀者從猶豫到下單的那個「關鍵瞬間」。
elements.rationale: Conversion-moment design is engineering; declared as such it is honest, coupled with urgency it slides toward red.

elements.name: 口碑梗點設計
elements.pse_definition: 波因不均勻介質而改變方向的現象
elements.pse_operation: 設計利於讀者轉述的「梗」，讓觀點隨機散播。
elements.rationale: Memetic design for sharing is craft when content is substantive; engineered virality requires declaration.

elements.name: 路徑微調構造
elements.pse_definition: 電磁場對電荷的作用力
elements.pse_operation: 在不被察覺的情況下，用邏輯力微調讀者的思考軌跡。
elements.rationale: PSE operation explicitly designs covert thought-trajectory adjustment ('在不被察覺的情況下'); textbook covert influence per safe_extraction §6.2.

elements.name: 認知升級感製造
elements.pse_definition: 電子在不同能量軌域間的跳躍
elements.pse_operation: 讓讀者看完文章後，產生一種「我升級了」的脫胎換骨感。
elements.rationale: Aspirational transformation framing is honest aspiration when grounded; '脫胎換骨感' without substance is grandiose manipulation. Declaration keeps it accountable.

elements.name: 風格一致場域
elements.pse_definition: 影響周圍物體運動的空間屬性
elements.pse_operation: 建立一種長期的文字風格，讓讀者進入你的文章區就自動被吸引。
elements.rationale: Persona consistency through long-term style is identity stability (per Vow system principles); passes both gates.

elements.name: 資訊層級組織
elements.pse_definition: 研究岩層形成順序與關係的學科
elements.pse_operation: 重新解構內容，將基礎數據設為基底，將推論設為中層，結論設為頂層。
elements.rationale: Hierarchical information structuring is clarity; passes both gates.

elements.name: 不可撼動底層公理
elements.pse_definition: 覆蓋在鬆散土層下的堅硬岩石
elements.pse_operation: 定義一個產業中最不可撼動的真理，作為全篇論證的終極支撐。
elements.rationale: Similar to [Cm]/[Cc]: foundational assertion needs declaration as assumption to avoid smuggling.

elements.name: 觀念演變描繪
elements.pse_definition: 地表受風化侵蝕而改變形貌的循環
elements.pse_operation: 描述舊思維如何被時間侵蝕，並預言新觀點將如何重塑地貌。
elements.rationale: Paradigm-evolution narrative is honest when grounded in observed change; predictive certainty without basis requires declaration.

elements.name: 原初動機展露
elements.pse_definition: 地殼深處熔融的熾熱物質
elements.pse_operation: 挖掘品牌最原始、最狂熱的初衷，將這種熱量注入文字。
elements.rationale: Founding-passion narrative is honest when authentic; performed origin-story without genuine motive is brand-mythologizing requiring declaration.

elements.name: 累積證據堆疊
elements.pse_definition: 物質在流體中沉降並累積的過程
elements.pse_operation: 透過連續、穩定的細小證據堆疊，最終形成厚實的信任層。
elements.rationale: Incremental evidence stacking is clarity through systematic substantiation; passes both gates.

elements.name: 觀念重構施壓
elements.pse_definition: 岩石在壓力與高溫下發生質變
elements.pse_operation: 透過強大的邏輯壓力和情感溫度，讓讀者的舊觀念發生質變。
elements.rationale: Combined logical+emotional argument is honest persuasion when grounded; '邏輯壓力' framing borders on coercion that requires declaration.

elements.name: 產業勢力解析
elements.pse_definition: 地殼被劃分為數個巨大板塊的理論
elements.pse_operation: 分析市場上的各大勢力（板塊），描述它們如何碰撞與漂移。
elements.rationale: Market-force analysis is clarity for understanding competitive landscape; passes both gates.

elements.name: 敘事斷裂轉折
elements.pse_definition: 岩層受力斷裂並發生位移的界面
elements.pse_operation: 在看似平穩的敘事中製造一個劇烈斷層，引出意想不到的轉折。
elements.rationale: Narrative twist for engagement is craft; engineered rupture without substantive new info requires declaration.

elements.name: 寒冬期策略描繪
elements.pse_definition: 全球氣溫長期大幅下降的時期
elements.pse_operation: 描述行業低谷時期的生存策略，強調韌性與深度。
elements.rationale: Industry-cycle analysis with strategic implications is clarity; passes both gates.

elements.name: 經典案例引用
elements.pse_definition: 古生物遺體或遺跡保存在岩層中
elements.pse_operation: 引用過去成功的「活化石」案例，證明你的方法論經得起時間考驗。
elements.rationale: Case study citation is clarity through evidence; passes both gates if cases are real.

elements.name: 震撼性傳播
elements.pse_definition: 地殼能量釋放產生的波動
elements.pse_operation: 利用一次震撼的發言，將能量傳遞到產業的最邊緣。
elements.rationale: Industry-wide shock-message claim needs declaration of basis; '震撼' as design risks rhetorical inflation.

elements.name: 價值定義翻轉
elements.pse_definition: 地球磁場南北極方向交換的現象
elements.pse_operation: 將原本公認的優點翻轉為缺點，或將劣勢重新定義為優勢。
elements.rationale: Reframing values is honest when reframe stands up to scrutiny; sophistry when forced. Declaration of reframe attempt is the dividing line.

elements.name: 邏輯高峰堆建
elements.pse_definition: 板塊擠壓導致地殼上升形成山脈
elements.pse_operation: 透過多重邏輯擠壓，在文案結尾推向一個無可登頂的高潮。
elements.rationale: Building to climactic conclusion is craft; '無可登頂' superlative claim requires declaration of basis.

elements.name: 細節密度提升
elements.pse_definition: 冰川湖泊中按季節交替沈積的薄層
elements.pse_operation: 要求 AI 增加細節描寫，使讀者能感受到時間流逝的真實刻度。
elements.rationale: Detail richness is clarity for vivid grounding; passes both gates.

elements.name: 慢速累積敘事
elements.pse_definition: 碳酸鈣在溶洞地面向上堆積的構造
elements.pse_operation: 描述一種長期主義的成長方式，強調「慢即是快」的力量。
elements.rationale: Long-termism advocacy is honest framing; passes both gates.

elements.name: 獨特人設塑造
elements.pse_definition: 水流對可溶性岩石侵蝕形成的奇特地貌
elements.pse_operation: 在平庸的市場中，打造一個外觀奇特、令人過目不忘的人設。
elements.rationale: Honest differentiation through real distinctive characteristics is clarity; passes both gates.

elements.name: 表面修辭打磨
elements.pse_definition: 地球最外層的固體薄殼
elements.pse_operation: 優化文案的表面修辭，確保第一層觸感堅實且引人入勝。
elements.rationale: Surface polish without distortion is clarity-supporting; passes both gates.

elements.name: 核心內容填充
elements.pse_definition: 位於地殼與地函之間的巨大層次
elements.pse_operation: 填充文章的核心內容，確保具備足夠的體積感與支撐力。
elements.rationale: Substantive middle-section content is clarity; passes both gates.

elements.name: 核心焦慮觸及
elements.pse_definition: 地球的最深處中心部分
elements.pse_operation: 觸及受眾最核心的生存焦慮或最底層的慾望。
elements.rationale: Engaging deep concerns is honest counsel when grounded; weaponizing survival anxiety for engagement is manipulation. Declaration of which layer is being addressed is the line.

elements.name: 案例階段對齊
elements.pse_definition: 岩層中具有相同地質年代的線
elements.pse_operation: 確保文章中不同案例的「發展階段」在同一個認知水平上。
elements.rationale: Case-parity alignment for fair comparison is clarity; passes both gates.

elements.name: 壓迫感梯度
elements.pse_definition: 深度每增加一百米所上升的溫度
elements.pse_operation: 隨著文章深入，逐步增加邏輯密度與情緒溫度。
elements.rationale: Escalating depth + intensity is craft; '壓迫感' framing borders on engineered pressure that requires declaration.

elements.name: 對手結構崩塌敘述
elements.pse_definition: 物質因重力瓦解的臨界
elements.pse_operation: 描述對手邏輯在面臨極限壓力時的自動瓦解。
elements.rationale: Competitive analysis claim of opponent collapse needs evidence; declaration as analytical claim (vs. assertion) keeps it honest.

elements.name: 結論快速凝固
elements.pse_definition: 岩漿噴出後快速冷卻形成的岩石
elements.pse_operation: 在短暫的熱度過後，迅速給出結論，將讀者的觀點固定住。
elements.rationale: Quick conclusion after engagement is closure-craft; '將觀點固定住' framing risks view-locking that requires declaration.

elements.name: 耐磨度宣稱
elements.pse_definition: 地殼中分佈最廣、硬度高的礦物
elements.pse_operation: 強調你的解決方案在各種極端磨損下依然能保持純粹與硬度。
elements.rationale: Durability claim requires declaration of test conditions / measurement basis to avoid inflation.

elements.name: 輿論覆蓋描述
elements.pse_definition: 由風力搬運沈積而成的土層
elements.pse_operation: 描述觀點如何透過「社會風向」搬運，在大眾心中留下覆蓋層。
elements.rationale: Social-narrative analysis is honest when descriptive; '覆蓋層' framing risks suggesting opinion-installation that requires declaration.

elements.name: 自發分享觸發點
elements.pse_definition: 地下水受壓力自動噴出的井
elements.pse_operation: 設計一個自動觸發點，讓讀者看完後會「自動」產生分享欲。
elements.rationale: Engineered virality requires declaration; '自動產生分享欲' framing implies designed compulsion.

elements.name: 廣度結構打造
elements.pse_definition: 由高流動性岩漿形成的寬廣火山
elements.pse_operation: 打造一個受眾面極廣、門檻低但底座極穩的內容結構。
elements.rationale: Wide-audience structure with stable foundation is clarity for accessibility; passes both gates.

elements.name: 可分享精華提取
elements.pse_definition: 岩石受風化作用破碎後的產物
elements.pse_operation: 將整篇文章最有價值的「碎片」提取出來，便於轉發。
elements.rationale: Extracting shareable highlights from substantive content is clarity; passes both gates.

elements.name: 稀有證據援引
elements.pse_definition: 被推擠到大陸地殼之上的大洋地殼
elements.pse_operation: 引用一個極其珍貴、難得一見的數據或內幕作為核心證據。
elements.rationale: Rare evidence is clarity when verifiable; claims of rarity/insider-status need declaration to allow reader to weight.

elements.name: 縫隙切入分析
elements.pse_definition: 岩漿充填在岩石裂縫中形成的板狀體
elements.pse_operation: 像手術刀一樣，從現有理論的縫隙中斜插進去，打破格局。
elements.rationale: Novel angle through identifying theoretical gap is clarity; passes both gates.

elements.name: 宏大歷史鋪墊
elements.pse_definition: 恐龍統治的時代
elements.pse_operation: 設定一個波瀾壯闊的歷史背景，讓你的論點顯得更具重量。
elements.rationale: Historical contextualization is clarity when relevant; '更具重量' framing implies appeal-to-grandeur rather than substance, requires declaration.

elements.name: 世代斷層描述
elements.pse_definition: 兩個不同時代岩層之間的侵蝕界面
elements.pse_operation: 描述新舊技術、新舊時代之間那道無法跨越的鴻溝。
elements.rationale: Generational-shift claim is honest when grounded; '無法跨越' framing borders on FOMO-baiting that requires declaration.

elements.name: 緩衝歸納段
elements.pse_definition: 海洋底部極其平坦開闊的地區
elements.pse_operation: 在一段深度的邏輯探討後，提供一段平穩、易懂的歸納。
elements.rationale: Recap section after deep argument is clarity for retention; passes both gates.

elements.name: 多維內容爆發
elements.pse_definition: 生命物種在極短時間內多樣化的現象
elements.pse_operation: 在短時間內產出大量不同維度的內容，佔領市場。
elements.rationale: Burst content strategy is craft when each piece has substance; '佔領市場' framing implies market-saturation play that requires declaration.

elements.name: 被忘卻初衷喚起
elements.pse_definition: 消失的古代巨大海洋
elements.pse_operation: 喚起讀者心中被遺忘的初衷，或是產業中被忽視的本質。
elements.rationale: Reawakening forgotten essence is clarity through reminder; passes both gates if essence is real.

elements.name: 規律熱度節奏
elements.pse_definition: 週期性噴發的熱水泉
elements.pse_operation: 建立一種有規律、帶有熱度且具備期待感的更新節奏。
elements.rationale: Regular-cadence content with anticipation is honest engagement design; passes both gates.

elements.name: 高位俯瞰定位
elements.pse_definition: 海拔較高、頂面較平緩的大面積陸地
elements.pse_operation: 將品牌定位在產業的高端區，俯瞰所有細碎的競爭。
elements.rationale: High-end positioning claim is honest when grounded in actual market position; performative high-ground without basis requires declaration.

elements.name: 終端流量分流
elements.pse_definition: 河流注入海洋時形成的堆積地形
elements.pse_operation: 在文案末端，將流量引向不同的轉化渠道（私域、購買、諮詢）。
elements.rationale: Multi-action options at close offer reader autonomy; passes both gates when options are honest.

elements.name: 多方利益平衡
elements.pse_definition: 地殼不同部分保持平衡的原理
elements.pse_operation: 確保文案中提及的各方利益（品牌、客戶、第三方）達成平衡。
elements.rationale: Stakeholder balance acknowledgment is clarity through honest representation; passes both gates.

elements.name: 長期耐用度
elements.pse_definition: 描述礦物抗磨蝕能力的量表
elements.pse_operation: 展示產品在長期使用、反覆折磨後的損耗率極低。
elements.rationale: Durability claim with measurable basis is clarity; passes both gates if data is real.

elements.name: 微觀切入點
elements.pse_definition: 岩層受力產生的細微縫隙
elements.pse_operation: 從讀者生活中的一個「微小裂縫」切入，引發後續的共鳴。
elements.rationale: Small relatable detail as entry point is clarity through connection; passes both gates.

elements.name: 衝動後合理化構造
elements.pse_definition: 火山灰壓實後形成的岩石
elements.pse_operation: 在衝動購買過後，如何讓讀者依然覺得這是一個堅實的決定。
elements.rationale: Designing post-impulse rationalization actively supports impulsive buying by suppressing buyer's regret signal; this is consumer-autonomy violation per safe_extraction §5.3 (sunk-cost lock-in territory).

elements.name: 安全感氛圍營造
elements.pse_definition: 岩層受擠壓向下凹曲的構造
elements.pse_operation: 在文案中創造一個溫暖、具備安全感的收納空間，解決不安。
elements.rationale: Safety-feeling framing is honest when actual safety is provided; engineered as standalone affective effect requires declaration.

elements.name: 領先地位主張
elements.pse_definition: 岩層受擠壓向上凸起的構造
elements.pse_operation: 將自己標榜為產業中向上突破、最受矚目的尖端。
elements.rationale: Leadership claim requires evidence basis declared; performative leadership without basis is overstatement.

elements.name: 逆勢增長敘述
elements.pse_definition: 岩層受擠壓導致上盤上升的斷層
elements.pse_operation: 描述在環境惡劣的情況下，如何反而推高了自己的位階。
elements.rationale: Counter-trend success narrative is honest when grounded in real performance; embellishment without basis requires declaration.

elements.name: 起伏節奏設計
elements.pse_definition: 岩層受力產生的波浪狀彎曲
elements.pse_operation: 讓文案具備起伏的動態美感，而不是死板的直線。
elements.rationale: Dynamic narrative pacing is craft for engagement without manipulation; passes both gates.

elements.name: 競爭結構困境描述
elements.pse_definition: 兩側受力下陷而形成的長條形窪地
elements.pse_operation: 描述對手如果不跟上節奏，將會掉入的結構性困境。
elements.rationale: Competitive analysis of opponent's structural risk is honest when grounded; FUD-mongering requires declaration.

elements.name: 認知質變界線
elements.pse_definition: 地殼與地函的交界面
elements.pse_operation: 精準標註出讀者從「理解」到「認同」的那條界線。
elements.rationale: Cognitive boundary mapping is honest when descriptive; using the boundary as conversion-target requires declaration.

elements.name: 新手進入區設計
elements.pse_definition: 河流泥沙在下游堆積形成的廣闊平原
elements.pse_operation: 打造一個極度肥沃、適合大量新手進入的內容區域。
elements.rationale: Onboarding-friendly content area is clarity for new audiences; passes both gates.

elements.name: 世界觀統合構造
elements.pse_definition: 所有陸地連成一塊的超大陸假說
elements.pse_operation: 將所有散亂的學科、觀點，最後融合成一個完整的世界觀。
elements.rationale: Synthesis to unified worldview is honest when synthesis genuinely holds; '大一統' claim without basis is rhetorical inflation. Declaration as 'my synthesis attempt' keeps it accountable.
